name: task_create
description:
Create a new task by calling the runtime's POST /tasks endpoint. The runtime
owns schema validation, ID generation, atomic write, and activity-log
emission. Returns the created task and its on-disk path.

name.description: Brief, descriptive name for the task

description.description: Detailed description of what the task does and why it's needed

category.description: Task category (validated by the runtime against the merged settings chain)

effort.description: Effort estimate (XS=1 day, S=2-3 days, M=1 week, L=2 weeks, XL=3+ weeks)

type.description: Task type (default prompt). Non-prompt types are non-LLM and still run inside the workflow worktree.

status.description: Initial status (defaults to 'todo' in the runtime).

dependencies.description: Task IDs that must reach a satisfying terminal status first

provenance.description: Optional provenance bag (workflow / run_id / source). Standalone tasks omit this.

extensions.description: Free-form extension fields preserved verbatim by the runtime.

needs_review.description: Shorthand for extensions.review.required=true. When set, agents must call task_mark_needs_review instead of task_set_status(done) when finishing the task, and the work waits for human approval via task_submit_review.
